ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the document */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the version was reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who reviewed this version */,
  "page_number" TEXT /* Page numbers affected by the amendments */,
  "amendment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the amendments in this version */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Reviewer comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., administrator, contributor) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., reviewer, approver) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Document ID */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Document ID */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version ID */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_version_history_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
column_names: ID of the author who created the document
Status of the document (e.g., draft, reviewed, published)
Reference to the document this version belongs to
ID of the reviewer who reviewed this version
Page numbers affected by the amendments
Reason for the amendments in this version
Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected)
Role of the author (e.g., administrator, contributor)
Role of the reviewer (e.g., reviewer, approver)
Unique identifier for each history entry
